input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.6.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.6.1.1
            TITLE: working gas - the working gas must be non flammable

            CONTENT:
            rule T.6.1.1: Working Gas - The working gas must be non flammable
T.6.1.1 Working Gas - The working gas must be non flammable

final_answer: Working Gas - The working gas must be non flammable
